title: Aetheric Realms
description: Enhanced Minecraft client: better FPS, stunning graphics, useful features, and unique gameplay possibilities.
body:
Modpack Aetheric Realms Version 0.1 is a client-side modpack for Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.4, inspired by the namesake project for Bedrock Edition. It enhances the game with improved animations, visual effects, and atmospheric shaders while maintaining lightweight performance and compatibility with multiplayer gameplay.

Key Features:
Fresh Animations & Not Enough Animations – Realistic animations for player movements and mobs.
Complementary Shaders & AstraLex Shaders – Beautiful shaders featuring soft lighting and fog effects.
Animated Items & Animated Loading Screen – Animated items and loading screens for a dynamic experience.
Zoomify – Smooth zooming functionality with customizable settings.
Continuity & Model Gap Fix – Eliminates visual gaps between blocks for seamless visuals.
LambDynamicLights & Better Clouds – Dynamic lighting and enhanced cloud rendering.
Hold My Items & Fine Armory – New visual effects for items and weapons.
Tools & Utils – An additional resource pack to further enhance the visual experience.
Xaero’s Minimap & World Map – Handy mini-map and full-world map for navigation.
Plasmo Voice – Integrated voice chat directly in the game.
This modpack is fully client-side and does not require installation on the server. It can be easily installed via Modrinth App, MultiMC, or Prism Launcher.
